name: Election to Deduct Organizational Expenditures

eligibility.description: New corporations with expenditures incident to the creation of the corporation; the $5,000 is phased out if total costs exceed $50,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporations can elect to deduct up to $5,000 of organizational expenditures in the first year of business, with the remainder amortized over 180 months.
